difficulty.reason: Perennial, drought-tolerant, low-growing ground cover, nearly indestructible

growth_stages.name: Dormant
growth_stages.look_for: Woody stems with small dry leaves, plant looks brown but alive

growth_stages.name: Spring Flush
growth_stages.look_for: Fresh tiny green leaves appearing on the stems

prompt.en: Run your hand over the thyme -- smell your fingers! What does it remind you of?
prompt.da: Koer din haand hen over timianen -- lugt paa dine fingre! Hvad minder det dig om?

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Tiny purple-pink flowers covering the plant, bees buzzing around

prompt.en: Sit still and watch -- how many bees visit the thyme flowers in one minute?
prompt.da: Sid stille og se -- hvor mange bier besoeger timianblomsterme paa et minut?

growth_stages.name: Late Season
growth_stages.look_for: Plant spreading wider, aromatic when touched

prompt.en: Pinch off a few sprigs -- we'll put them in tonight's dinner!
prompt.da: Knib et par kviste af -- vi putter dem i aftensmaden!

human_readable.en: Very drought tolerant. Water only in extended dry spells.
human_readable.da: Meget toerketolerant. Vand kun i laengere toerkeperioder.

harvest.notes: Perennial: harvest sprigs as needed. Best flavor before flowering. Trim after flowering to stay compact.

companion_plants.notes: Deters slugs near strawberries. Low ground cover doesn't compete.

message.en: Even thyme needs water eventually -- soil is very dry!
message.da: Selv timian har brug for vand til sidst -- jorden er meget toer!
